seoTitle: Healy vs Heathwood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Healy and Heathwood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Healy and Heathwood.
heading: Healy vs Heathwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Healy, Queensland and Heathwood, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Heathwood has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Healy (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Healy or Heathwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Healy has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Heathwood scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Healy scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Heathwood scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Healy or Heathwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Heathwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
